widgets_values: ## - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) — Install or update this node pack to get the Audio/Video VAE node

# LTXV-2.3 Model Files & Dependencies

## Diffusion Model
**LTXV-2.3 DEV GGUF Q4_K_M**  
*Place in:* `diffusion_models`

- [ltx-2.3-22b-dev_Q4_K_M.gguf](https://huggingface.co/vantagewithai/LTX-2.3-GGUF/blob/main/dev/ltx-2-3-22b-dev-Q4_K_M.gguf)

---

## Distilled LoRA
**ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora**  
*Place in:* `loras`

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/loras/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_105_bf16.safetensors)

---

## Text Encoder
**Gemma 3 12B (FP4 mixed)**  
*Place in:* `clip`

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

---

## Dual CLIP Connector
**LTX-2.3 Text Projection Connector (bf16)**  
*Place in:* `clip/text encoders`

- [ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/text_encoders/ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors)

---

## Audio & Video VAE
**LTX-2.3 VAE Files**  
*Place in:* `vae`

- [LTX-2.3 VAE Folder](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/vae)

---

A cartoon animated scene set in a sunny Indian village. 
An elderly bald man with white side hair and a thick white 
mustache, wearing a white shirt and brown pants, sits on a 
wooden chair outdoors. His face is visibly angry and flushed 
red, eyebrows deeply furrowed and pushed down hard, eyes 
wide and intense with a sharp fierce gaze, jaw clenched, 
mouth open mid-speech showing teeth, one hand raised firmly 
pointing forward, body leaning slightly forward in anger. 
The background remains fixed and consistent throughout — 
warm Indian village setting with mud houses, dusty ground, 
green mango trees and bright blue sky visible behind him, 
static camera position, no camera movement. Cartoon 
animation style, smooth expressive facial animation, 
consistent character design, soft warm sunlight, 
wide establishing shot, fixed background.

nodes.title: Character Prompts 💬
widgets_values:
#4
A cartoon animated scene. Young boy Rahul with black hair, yellow t-shirt speaks expressively with clear lip sync, hand gesturing, eyebrows animated. Grandfather sits nearby listening attentively, no lip movement. Cartoon style, consistent characters, static background.
#7
A cartoon animated scene. Elderly bald grandfather speaks with visible anger with clear lip sync, face flushed, eyebrows furrowed, one hand raised. Young boy listens with concerned expression, no lip movement. Indoor village room, cartoon style, static background.

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
